title: Capstone Case Study 1 - ABC Electronics India Transportation Transformation

sections.title: Project Kickoff
sections.subtitle: ABC Electronics India SAP TM Transformation Program
sections.description: You are joining the implementation team as an SAP TM Functional Consultant.

notes: Transportation cost increased by 18% in two years.

sections.background: The Logistics Director asks you to explain how SAP TM will solve the company's transportation challenges.
questions: Which business problems can SAP TM solve immediately?
Which problems require integration with SAP EWM?
Which transportation processes should be automated?

sections.title: Consultant Decision
sections.question: The client requests complete manual carrier selection because planners do not trust automatic planning. What should you recommend?

options.text: Use SAP standard automatic planning with planner approval.
Develop a custom carrier selection engine.

sections.explanation: SAP Best Practice recommends automated planning with planner intervention only for exceptions. This reduces planning effort while maintaining business control.

sections.title: Senior Consultant Advice
sections.content: Do not begin system configuration during requirement gathering. First understand the business, document requirements, perform fit-gap analysis and obtain business approval before moving into solution design.

sections.title: Accenture Interview Scenario
sections.content: If a client requests a customization that conflicts with SAP standard functionality, first understand the business need, demonstrate the SAP standard solution, explain the long-term maintenance impact of customization and recommend custom development only if the business requirement cannot reasonably be achieved through configuration.

sections.title: Phase Completion
sections.content: Requirement gathering is complete. The project team has documented business pain points, identified high-priority requirements, completed the initial fit-gap analysis and received approval to begin solution blueprinting.
